sections.one_line: Three hardcoded tool registries drifted apart, hiding tools from surfacing paths and dispatch.
Implementation rules for schema imports, policy facades, and separate CRB parcel handling in Kernos
Location of the kernel tool registry and its schema/descriptor entry points
Kernel tool descriptor contract for tool identity, schema, policy metadata, and dispatch reference
Policy field map showing owners, accessors, and parity checks for tool policy access
Future contract for workshop tools in the registrar and dispatch system
